title: Minecraft Better Experience
description:
My First Mod, In ModRinth
It Includes
-More Food
-Emerald Tools and armor
-Bone Dimension
-Fire And Ice Dimensions
-And a Backpack!
So try it out!
body:
Welcome To My New First Mod!, So Try it out!

Hope You Like It!
Includes
-More Food
-Emerald Tools And Armor
-Bone Dimension
-Fire And Ice Dimensions
-EnderLight Dimension
-Secret Menu...
-New Effects and Potions
-New Villager Proffesion
-Fire, Ice, Poison, Shadow, Lightning and Super Shards
-Sun Dust, Shape and Gem and Moondust
-Sun Shield and Moon Sword
-a Backpack

And So Much More!

The Reason You Should Use The Mod Is Because It Adds A Ton of New Things That Are super cool!
And Even The Backpack!

NOTE: The Only Versions Available Are Only For The 1.19.2 And The 1.20.1 So Use A Forge Version Thats Compatible With 1.19.2 or 1.20.1 (for the 1.15 and the 1.16)

Post-NOTE: For 1.17.0 You can Only play it In 1.21.1 in NeoForge

And With That Hope You Enjoy!
And Please Download It...

PD: The Only Available Are The 1.13, 1.14, 1.15, 1.16 and 1.17, The 1.11 and 1.12 Are NOT Available To Download...
